title: Keeping QP Certification Defensible
alt: Checklist of what a QP confirms to certify a batch within its marketing authorisation

items.label: Hold a current MA view
items.desc: Approved specs, sites and conditions ready for every product certified

items.label: Match specifications
items.desc: Release limits, methods and criteria align to the approved MA

items.label: Verify sites & suppliers
items.desc: All sites, manufacturers and API sources named in the licence

items.label: Check variation status
items.desc: Treat any pending variation as not yet in force

items.label: Trust the data (ALCOA+)
items.desc: Records attributable, contemporaneous, original, accurate, complete

items.label: Document the confirmation
items.desc: Record the Annex 16 factors and use the technical agreement
